llm_answer: Providers must submit all behavioral health claims to Sunshine Health FL Medicaid within 180 days of the date of service [1]. This is a strict deadline enforced by Sunshine Health in accordance with Florida Medicaid policy [1]. For corrected claims, the deadline is 365 days from the original date of service [1]. Claims denied with CO-29 due to timely filing cannot be appealed if submitted after this deadline [1].
judge_reasoning: The response correctly identifies the 180-day deadline but incorrectly applies the 365-day deadline to corrected claims instead of non-participating providers.  [+2 must, -1 miss → score=0.33]
